name: Morgan Lee
content: The identity provider accepts my sign-in, but OPERATIONS-DASHBOARD says I do not have a workspace.

name: Riley Chen
content: I can check the workspace mapping. Did your identity-provider group name change recently?

name: Morgan Lee
content: Yes. Our group changed from warehouse-ops to warehouse-operations.

name: Riley Chen
content: I updated the group mapping. Please sign out and back in.

name: Morgan Lee
content: That worked. The supervisors can see the South Warehouse workspace now.

name: Riley Chen
content: Great, I will mark the access issue as resolved.

name: Morgan Lee
content: Confirmed. You can close the ticket.

name: Morgan Lee
content: ROBOT-101 unit three reports a calibration warning at South Warehouse.

name: Riley Chen
content: Check whether its calibration timestamp predates the maintenance event.

name: Morgan Lee
content: It does. Maintenance finished at 17:40, but the calibration record is from yesterday.

name: Riley Chen
content: Run the remote calibration workflow while the arm is idle.

name: Morgan Lee
content: Calibration completed and the validation cycle passed.

name: Riley Chen
content: I recorded the result and started a 48-hour verification period.

name: Morgan Lee
content: What is the best way to onboard two new shift supervisors to OPERATIONS-DASHBOARD?

name: Riley Chen
content: Add them to the read-only operations group and begin with the fleet overview.

name: Morgan Lee
content: Can read-only users change equipment records?

name: Riley Chen
content: No. They can inspect status and utilization but cannot edit records or acknowledge alerts.

name: Morgan Lee
content: Perfect. I will schedule the walkthrough for Tuesday.
